tests.title: chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page invalid and missing id behavior > handles /article/ without a runtime error or blank page
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page invalid and missing id behavior > handles /article without a runtime error or blank page
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page invalid and missing id behavior > falls back to article 1 when id is 999
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page invalid and missing id behavior > falls back to article 1 when id is 100
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page invalid and missing id behavior > falls back to article 1 when id is abc
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page content by id > renders article 1 with title, metadata, image, all paragraphs and copyright footer
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page UI rendering > renders the article shell in the expected visual order
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page responsive layout > desktop 1920x1080: article content remains visible without horizontal overflow
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page responsive layout > tablet 768x1024: article content remains visible without horizontal overflow
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page responsive layout > mobile 375x812: article content remains visible without horizontal overflow
chromium > article.spec.ts > Article page content by id > renders article 2 content and does not mix content from article 1 or article 3
